text:
* miwi@FreeBSD.org (miwi@FreeBSD.org) wrote:

> Any news here or can we close this pr?.
I have no objections. The problem described here is no more.
Though I've encountered it one more time, reboot fixed it (maybe
restarting X was enough actually). Still not sure on the cause...
